| Date | Topics | Slides etc | Assignments etc |
|------|---------|------------|--------------|
| Tue, Mar 18 | Portfolio optimization | [Course intro](day1-intro.pdf){target="_blank"} <br>[slides](day1-meanvariance.pdf){target="_blank"}<br>[Excel Example](Topic5.1_SharpeRatioExamples_Revised.xlsx){target="_blank"}| |
| Thur, Mar 20 | Simulation and forecasting<br>Break-outs |[slides](day2-simulation.pdf){target="_blank"}<br>[Online Data and Python](assets/data.pdf) | 1. Portfolio optimization|
| Tue, Mar 25 | Cost of equity capital<br>Break-outs | [slides](day3-costofequity.pdf){target="_blank"}| |
| Thur, Mar 27 | Fama-French model| [slides](day3-costofequity.pdf)<br>[Morningstar Quantitative Ratings](assets/Morningstar_Quantitative_Rating_for_Funds.pdf)<br>[Corporate Finance and Reality](assets/JOhnGraham.pdf)| 2. Simulation|
| Tue, Apr 1 | Attribution analysis<br>Break-outs |[slides](day5-attribution.pdf){target="_blank"} | |
| Thur, Apr 3 | Financial ratios | [slides](day6-ratios.pdf) | 3. Attribution analysis|
| Tue, Apr 8 | Capital budgeting| [slides](day7-capitalbudgeting.pdf)| |
| Thur, Apr 10 | Capital budgeting<br>Break-outs  | | 4. Financial ratios<br>Read *The Sneaker Project* before class|
| Tue, Apr 15 | Valuation | | | 
| Thur, Apr 17 | Option portfolios<br>Break-outs | | 5. Capital budgeting|
| Tue, Apr 22 | Intro to machine learning| | |
| Thur, Apr 24 | Applications of machine learning| | 6. Valuation|

The assignments are due by 11:59 pm on Thursdays.  Each assignment is a group assignment.  The details are on Canvas.  Upload a link to a Julius workflow for each assignment.
